results.rendered_html:
sam-upās (-upa-√ās) Ā. -upāste (pr. p. -upāsIna), to sit near together or near each other,  R. ;
to engage in or devote one's self to anything together, practise in common (or singly),  Gṛhyās. ;  R. ;
to serve or honour together, revere, worship, adore,  MBh. ;  Mṛcch. ;  Ragh.
